memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Moores_Ancestry
memoryArtifacts.description: This document was compiled by Orville Sullivan L6L2-JJB who is a grandson of Carrie Moore and Delos Sullivan, I was given a paper copy and decided to scan it in and create the searchable text form of the document so others may see and use it. I  tagged a number of the people found in the document to make it easier for others to locate.

memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Sullivan_Family_Sheet
memoryArtifacts.description:
This family sheet was found in papers of Mildred Evelyn Sullivan LNKH-8PV a granddaugher of Delos.

It was created by her brother Orville Oscar  Sullivan L6L2-JJB who had done a great deal of searching for ancestors. 

Many of the children of Delos appear to have had children.  None were entered at this time (7 July 2020) as I do not know their status

Nte that for Fay William the birth is Sept 21 not 2

zh.lifeSummary: 當Oscar Cornelius Sullivan於1895年10月12日出生在美國愛阿華州德卡度法也特 堂史普時，他的父親Delos Horace Sullivan31歲，母親Carrie Moore24歲。他和Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他於1950年住在美國華盛頓州可利吉塔特可利吉塔特且於1953年住在美國華盛頓州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門。他於1919年登記服兵役。他去世於1983年3月18日在美國華盛頓州克拉克溫哥華享年87歲，埋葬在美國華盛頓州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oscar Cornelius Sullivan于1895年10月12日出生在美国艾奥瓦州德卡度法也特 堂史普时，他的父亲Delos Horace Sullivan31岁，母亲Carrie Moore24岁。他和Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。他于1950年住在美国华盛顿州可利吉塔特可利吉塔特且于1953年住在美国华盛顿州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門。他于1919年登记服兵役。他去世于1983年3月18日在美国华盛顿州克拉克溫哥華享年87岁，埋葬在美国华盛顿州可利吉塔特懷特 賽門。

nameMeanings.name: Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

variants.name: O'Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

nameMeanings.name: Oscar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old Irish name , which is borne in the Fenian sagas by a grandson of  Finn mac Cumhaill  (  Finn MacCool ). It was resuscitated by the antiquarian poet  James Macpherson  (  1736–96 ), author of the Ossian poems. It is now also a characteristically Scandinavian name; it was introduced to Sweden because  Napoleon , an admirer of the works of  Macpherson , imposed the name on his godson Oscar Bernadotte, who became  King Oscar I  of Sweden in  1844  (  see also  Malvina  ). In more recent times it has been associated particularly with the Irish writer and wit  Oscar Wilde  (  1854–1900 ), and with the annual awards for achievement in the film industry made by the American Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences. Oscar is one of a number of Celtic names that have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: Cornelius
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Roman family name, Cornélius, which is of uncertain origin, possibly a derivative of Latin cornu ‘horn’. This was the name of a 3rd-century pope who is venerated as a saint. The name was particularly popular in the Low Countries, and immigrants contributed to its frequency in the north of England from the 1400s. However, it is now seldom used in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.
Historical Boundaries: 1899: Hubbard, Minnesota, United States

historicEvents.title: Attempting to Stop the War
historicEvents.description: To end World War I, President Wilson created a list of principles to be used as negotiations for peace among the nations. Known as The Fourteen Points, the principles were outlined in a speech on war aimed toward the idea of peace but most of the Allied forces were skeptical of this Wilsonian idealism.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Woodrow Wilson's Fourteen Points of Peace

historicEvents.title: Seattle General Strike
historicEvents.description: The Seattle general strike was a five day strike in 1919, where around 65,000 workers began striking for higher wages. This happened two years after WWI  wage controls.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Industrial Workers of the World in the Seattle General Strike

historicEvents.description: Galloping Gertie is the reference used to describe the Tacoma Narrows Bridge. It opened on July 1, 1940 four months later it no longer existed. On November 7, 1940 the wind gusts came up to 40 miles an hour causing the bridge to twist and vibrate violently before it collapsed into Puget Sound. The only victim of the bridge collapsing was a three-legged paralyzed dog named Tubby whose owner tried to rescue him from the car but he wouldn’t go with him.

historicEvents.title: The Cuban Missile Crisis
historicEvents.description: The Cuban Missile Crisis was a 13-day confrontation between the United States and the Soviet Union because of Soviet ballistic missile deployment in Cuba. This confrontation was the closest that the Cold War became a nuclear war.

historicEvents.title: Seattle World's Fair
historicEvents.description: Century 21 Exposition, also known as the World’s Fair in Seattle, went from April 21, 1962- October 21, 1962. It was located mostly in the Seattle Space Needle.

en.lifeSummary: When Oscar Cornelius Sullivan was born on 12 October 1895, in Fayette Township, Decatur, Iowa, United States, his father, Delos Horace Sullivan, was 31 and his mother, Carrie Moore, was 24. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham. He lived in Klickitat, Klickitat, Washington, United States in 1950 and White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, United States in 1953. He registered for military service in 1919. He died on 18 March 1983, in Vancouver, Clark, Washington, United States, at the age of 87, and was buried in White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Oscar Cornelius Sullivanが1895年10月12日にアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州デカトゥルファイエット トウンシュイップで生まれた時，父Delos Horace Sullivanは31歳，母Carrie Mooreは24歳であった。彼はGertrude Cecilia Cunninghamとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1950年にはアメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトクリクイタトに，1953年にはアメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトウィト サルモンに住んでいた。彼は1919年に兵役登録をした。彼は1983年3月18日にアメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クラークヴァンコウバーで87歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトウィト サルモンにて埋葬された。

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oscar Cornelius Sullivan nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1895, em Fayette Township, Decatur, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Delos Horace Sullivan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Carrie Moore, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham. Ele viveu em Klickitat, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos da América em 1950 e em White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos da América em 1953. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1919. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1983, em Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Estados Unidos da América, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oscar Cornelius Sullivan родился 12 октября 1895 г. в местности феиетт тоуншип, декатур, Айова, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Delos Horace Sullivan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Carrie Moore, 24. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham. Он жил в местности кликкитат, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты в 1950 году и в местности уит салмон, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты в 1953 году. В 1919 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 18 марта 1983 г. в местности ванкоувир, кларк, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности уит салмон, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты.
